message:
fix: resolve connection pool deadlock in dolt dependency resolution (G10)

GetDependenciesWithMetadata and GetDependentsWithMetadata held a rows
iterator (consuming the only DB connection with MaxOpenConns=1) while
calling GetIssue inside the loop, which needed a second connection.
This caused bd show and bd dep list to hang forever on any issue with
dependencies.

Fix: collect dep metadata first, close rows to release the connection,
then batch-fetch all issues via GetIssuesByIDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
